rationale: AAVE has a hard-capped maximum supply of 16,000,000 tokens with no protocol-level minting of new AAVE beyond what was originally distributed; the Aave governance/safety module does allow stkAAVE staking rewards and ecosystem reserve distributions, but these come from the pre-minted Ecosystem Reserve (originally ~3M AAVE) rather than new token issuance, meaning the total supply ceiling is fixed and net new inflation from minting is zero. CoinGecko confirms circulating supply has been effectively flat near ~14.9–15.1M AAVE for the past 12+ months with no new mint events, and the Aave governance docs confirm no scheduled future emissions beyond the existing reserve drawdowns.
